examples: How her silken robe is rustling!
Presently the door swung open, and a silken page said, "The Lady Jane Grey."
Tom sat up in bed and gazed out from the heavy silken curtains upon this fine company.
The silken threads of mutual presence would be thinned to the point of fraying.
Steven Rojas at Chez Papa Resto in San Francisco makes a silken "pancetta" from goat meat.
